title: Louisiana Board of Pharmacy; creation
doc_html:
PART II. BOARD OF PHARMACY

§1171. Louisiana Board of Pharmacy; creation

           The Louisiana Board of Pharmacy is hereby created within the Louisiana Department of Health and is subject to the provisions of R.S. 36:803. The board shall carry out the purposes and enforce the provisions of this Chapter.

           Acts 1999, No. 767, §1.
doc_text:
PART II.  BOARD OF PHARMACY
§1171.  Louisiana Board of Pharmacy; creation
The Louisiana Board of Pharmacy is hereby created within the
Louisiana Department of Health and is subject to the provisions of R.S.
36:803.  The board shall carry out the purposes and enforce the provisions of
this Chapter.
Acts 1999, No. 767, §1.
